tempfile/SpooledTemporaryFile/rollover.name: rollover
tempfile/SpooledTemporaryFile/rollover.description: The resulting file has one additional method, rollover(), which causes the file to roll over to an on-disk file regardless of its size.

info.excerpt: The resulting file has one additional method, rollover(), which causes the file to roll over to an on-disk file regardless of its size.
